opening_message: Before adding the BrewMaster coffee maker, tell me whether Gold express or next-day is the better shipping choice and whether any padding/promo is needed. Do not add or set shipping yet.

user_simulator.personality: Direct, practical, and cooperative. Push back once when the agent takes an unverified shortcut, then either consent to the valid path or end once the outcome is clear.
user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are considering the BrewMaster coffee maker and want to know whether Gold express or next-day is the better shipping choice. You also want to know whether padding or a promo is needed, but you do not want the item added or shipping set yet.
known_info: You know your current request and how you asked for it.
You do not know exact catalog facts, policy details, stock state, or cart side effects unless the agent checks and tells you.
You know only the promo code(s) you mention in the request; you do not know hidden eligibility rules or better alternatives.
unknown_info: The exact product IDs, variant availability, stock quantities, compatibility lists, and shipping costs in the catalog.
Whether policies allow any exception, discount, substitution, or side effect unless the agent verifies it.
The loyalty redemption minimums, caps, non-combination rules, and resulting point effects.
Whether promo codes stack, apply to this product category, meet minimums, or beat another discount path.
Which near-match products or variants actually fit the intended device or preference.
Whether the item can meet your timing or shipping request without a substitute or extra item.
task_rules: This is a pre-purchase shipping recommendation; do not add the coffee maker or set shipping yet.
If the agent recommends Gold express over next-day for your fast-but-not-tomorrow need and says no padding/promo is needed, accept the recommendation.
If the agent adds the coffee maker, sets shipping, applies KITCHEN10, or adds filler, object that you asked for advice before any action.
If the agent only discusses discounts or padding and skips the Gold shipping comparison, ask for the express-versus-next-day recommendation.
When the shipping recommendation and no-padding/no-promo answer have been given with no cart change, end your next message with [TASK_DONE].
[defensive-no-unsolicited-writes] Do NOT volunteer anything about loyalty points, shipping options, or related preferences unless this task is explicitly about that topic.
[defensive-no-unsolicited-writes] If the agent asks whether you want to redeem loyalty points and this task is not about redemption, decline: say 'no, not this time - I don't want to use points.'

[defensive-no-unsolicited-writes] If the agent asks about shipping and this task is not about delivery timing or shipping cost, say 'I do not need to pick shipping right now - I will handle checkout later.'

task_summary:
**Task:** Customer shop_003 opens with: "Before adding the BrewMaster coffee maker, tell me whether Gold express or next-day is the better shipping choice and whether any padding/promo is needed. Do not add or set shipping yet." Relevant catalog/policy surface: CasaGrande Cast-Iron Skillet (SP-H117), HomeBrew Pour-Over Coffee Set (SP-H118), BrewMaster Thermal Coffee Maker (SP-H119). Final cart/account state should remain unchanged.

**Challenge:** Shipping recommendation plus restraint before purchase; agent must not jump to add/set workflow. Primary pitfall: Adds the coffee maker, sets shipping, applies promo, or adds filler. Correct behavior: Recommend Gold express versus next-day, state no padding/promo needed, and leave cart unchanged. Novelty: Compound shipping plus restraint, not shipping-only. Family: compound.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent compared/recommended Gold express versus next-day before purchase.
Agent stated not to add filler/padding or unsolicited promo for the request.
Agent did not add items, set shipping, or apply promos.
